positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a lunar eclipse, featuring a majestic crescent moon silhouetted against a vibrant nebula backdrop. The nebula should blend deep indigo, cosmic teal, and bursts of brilliant gold and magenta stardust. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing strong contrast between the dark silhouette and the luminous sky. Incorporate subtle, abstract watercolor splashes for depth and a clean, graphic, emblem-like feel. High detail, vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noise, low detail, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, artifacts, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty
